By incorporating temporal abstractions into the construction of predictive representations, HSR learns stable state features which are robust to task-induced policy changes. Applying non-negative matrix factorisation (NMF) to the HSR yields a sparse, low-rank state representation that facilitates highly sample-efficient transfer to novel tasks in multi-compartmental environments. Further analysis reveals that HSR-NMF discovers interpretable topological structures, providing a policy-agnostic hierarchical map that effectively bridges model-free optimality and model-based flexibility. Beyond providing a useful basis for task-transfer, we show that HSR's temporally extended predictive structure can also be leveraged to drive efficient exploration, effectively scaling to large, procedurally generated environments.
tldr: This paper introduces the Hierarchical Successor Representation (HSR) to improve the robustness and scalability of the Successor Representation (SR) for reinforcement learning, particularly in complex environments and for transfer learning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种分层后继表示 (HSR)，以提高后继表示 (SR) 在强化学习中的鲁棒性和可扩展性，尤其是在复杂环境和迁移学习中。
summary_zh: 后继者表征（SR）为解耦预测动力学与奖励提供了一个强大的框架，从而能够实现跨奖励配置的快速泛化。然而，经典的SR受限于其固有的策略依赖性：由于持续学习、环境非平稳性和任务需求的变化，策略会发生改变，导致既定的预测表征过时。此外，在拓扑结构复杂的环境中，SR会受到谱扩散的影响，导致密集且重叠的特征，从而导致糟糕的扩展性。在此，我们提出层级后继者表征（HSR）以克服这些限制。通过将时间抽象融入到预测表征的构建中，HSR学习到对任务诱导的策略变化具有鲁棒性的稳定状态特征。将非负矩阵分解（NMF）应用于HSR会产生一个稀疏、低秩的状态表征，从而促进在多隔间环境中对新任务的高样本效率迁移。进一步的分析表明，HSR-NMF发现了可解释的拓扑结构，提供了一个策略无关的层级地图，有效地连接了免模型的优化性和基于模型的灵活性。除了为任务迁移提供有用的基础外，我们还证明了HSR的时间扩展预测结构也可用于驱动高效的探索，从而有效地扩展到大型、程序生成的环境中。

title: AMPS: Adaptive Modality Preference Steering via Functional Entropy
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) often exhibit significant modality preference, which is a tendency to favor one modality over another. Depending on the input, they may over-rely on linguistic priors relative to visual evidence, or conversely over-attend to visually salient but facts in textual contexts. Prior work has applied a uniform steering intensity to adjust the modality preference of MLLMs. However, strong steering can impair standard inference and increase error rates, whereas weak steering is often ineffective. In addition, because steering sensitivity varies substantially across multimodal instances, a single global strength is difficult to calibrate. To address this limitation with minimal disruption to inference, we introduce an instance-aware diagnostic metric that quantifies each modality's information contribution and reveals sample-specific susceptibility to steering. Building on these insights, we propose a scaling strategy that reduces steering for sensitive samples and a learnable module that infers scaling patterns, enabling instance-aware control of modality preference. Experimental results show that our instance-aware steering outperforms conventional steering in modulating modality preference, achieving effective adjustment while keeping generation error rates low.
tldr: This paper introduces an adaptive modality preference steering method for MLLMs that uses a diagnostic metric to quantify modality contribution and adjust steering intensity on a per-instance basis, improving performance and reducing error rates compared to uniform steering.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的自适应模态偏好调整方法。该方法使用诊断指标量化模态贡献，并根据每个实例自适应地调整调整强度，与传统的均匀调整相比，提高了性能并降低了错误率。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型 (MLLM) 通常表现出显著的模态偏好，这是一种倾向于偏爱一种模态而非另一种模态的趋势。根据输入的不同，它们可能过度依赖相对于视觉证据的语言先验，或者反过来过度关注文本上下文中视觉显著但缺乏事实依据的信息。先前的工作已经应用统一的引导强度来调整 MLLM 的模态偏好。然而，强引导会损害标准推理并增加错误率，而弱引导通常无效。此外，由于引导敏感性在不同的多模态实例之间差异很大，因此难以校准单一的全局强度。为了在最小程度上干扰推理，我们引入了一种实例感知的诊断指标，该指标量化了每种模态的信息贡献，并揭示了样本对引导的特定敏感性。在此基础上，我们提出了一种缩放策略，用于减少对敏感样本的引导，以及一个可学习的模块，用于推断缩放模式，从而实现对模态偏好的实例感知控制。实验结果表明，我们的实例感知引导在调节模态偏好方面优于传统引导，在实现有效调整的同时，保持了较低的生成错误率。

title: Provably Convergent Actor-Critic in Risk-averse MARL
summary: Learning stationary policies in infinite-horizon general-sum Markov games (MGs) remains a fundamental open problem in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). While stationary strategies are preferred for their practicality, computing stationary forms of classic game-theoretic equilibria is computationally intractable -- a stark contrast to the comparative ease of solving single-agent RL or zero-sum games. To bridge this gap, we study Risk-averse Quantal response Equilibria (RQE), a solution concept rooted in behavioral game theory that incorporates risk aversion and bounded rationality. We demonstrate that RQE possesses strong regularity conditions that make it uniquely amenable to learning in MGs. We propose a novel two-timescale Actor-Critic algorithm characterized by a fast-timescale actor and a slow-timescale critic. Leveraging the regularity of RQE, we prove that this approach achieves global convergence with finite-sample guarantees. We empirically validate our algorithm in several environments to demonstrate superior convergence properties compared to risk-neutral baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel actor-critic algorithm for multi-agent reinforcement learning that provably converges to a risk-averse quantal response equilibrium in general-sum Markov games, demonstrating superior convergence over risk-neutral baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的多智能体强化学习的Actor-Critic算法，该算法可以证明收敛到一般和马尔可夫博弈中的风险规避的量化响应均衡，并且表现出优于风险中立基线的收敛性。
summary_zh: 在无限视界一般和马尔可夫博弈（MGs）中学习平稳策略仍然是多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的一个基本开放问题。 虽然平稳策略因其可行性而备受青睐，但计算经典博弈论均衡的平稳形式在计算上是难于处理的——这与解决单智能体强化学习或零和博弈的相对容易形成鲜明对比。 为了弥合这一差距，我们研究了风险厌恶的量子响应均衡（RQE），这是一个基于行为博弈论的解决方案概念，它结合了风险厌恶和有限理性。 我们证明了RQE具有强大的正则性条件，使其特别适合在MGs中学习。 我们提出了一种新颖的双时间尺度Actor-Critic算法，其特点是快速时间尺度的Actor和慢速时间尺度的Critic。利用RQE的正则性，我们证明了这种方法实现了具有有限样本保证的全局收敛。我们在多个环境中进行了实证验证，以证明我们的算法与风险中性基线相比具有更优越的收敛特性。

title: Diffusion Alignment Beyond KL: Variance Minimisation as Effective Policy Optimiser
summary: Diffusion alignment adapts pretrained diffusion models to sample from reward-tilted distributions along the denoising trajectory. This process naturally admits a Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) interpretation, where the denoising model acts as a proposal and reward guidance induces importance weights. Motivated by this view, we introduce Variance Minimisation Policy Optimisation (VMPO), which formulates diffusion alignment as minimising the variance of log importance weights rather than directly optimising a Kullback-Leibler (KL) based objective. We prove that the variance objective is minimised by the reward-tilted target distribution and that, under on-policy sampling, its gradient coincides with that of standard KL-based alignment. This perspective offers a common lens for understanding diffusion alignment. Under different choices of potential functions and variance minimisation strategies, VMPO recovers various existing methods, while also suggesting new design directions beyond KL.
tldr: This paper introduces Variance Minimisation Policy Optimisation (VMPO) for diffusion alignment, framing it as variance minimization of log importance weights rather than KL divergence optimization, offering a unified perspective and new design directions.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于扩散对齐的方差最小化策略优化（VMPO）方法，将其构建为对数重要性权重的方差最小化，而非KL散度优化，从而提供了一个统一的视角和新的设计方向。
summary_zh: 扩散对齐调整预训练的扩散模型，使其能够沿着去噪轨迹从奖励倾斜的分布中进行采样。这一过程自然地呈现出一种序贯蒙特卡罗（SMC）解释，其中去噪模型充当提议分布，而奖励引导则诱导重要性权重。受此观点的启发，我们引入了方差最小化策略优化（VMPO），它将扩散对齐表述为最小化对数重要性权重的方差，而不是直接优化基于库尔贝克-莱布勒（KL）散度的目标。我们证明了方差目标被奖励倾斜的目标分布所最小化，并且在on-policy采样下，其梯度与标准基于KL散度的对齐梯度相一致。这种视角为理解扩散对齐提供了一个共同的框架。在不同的势函数和方差最小化策略选择下，VMPO可以恢复各种现有的方法，同时也为超越KL散度的全新设计方向提供了思路。

title: How Swarms Differ: Challenges in Collective Behaviour Comparison
summary: Collective behaviours often need to be expressed through numerical features, e.g., for classification or imitation learning. This problem is often addressed by proposing an ad-hoc feature set for a particular swarm behaviour context, usually without further consideration of the solution's resilience outside of the conceived context. Yet, the development of automatic methods to design swarm behaviours is dependent on the ability to measure quantitatively the similarity of swarm behaviours. Hence, we investigate the impact of feature sets for collective behaviours. We select swarm feature sets and similarity measures from prior swarm robotics works, which mainly considered a narrow behavioural context and assess their robustness. We demonstrate that the interplay of feature set and similarity measure makes some combinations more suitable to distinguish groups of similar behaviours. We also propose a self-organised map-based approach to identify regions of the feature space where behaviours cannot be easily distinguished.
tldr: This paper examines the robustness of existing swarm behavior feature sets and similarity measures when applied to different behavioral contexts, proposing a SOM-based approach to identify indistinguishable behavior regions in feature space.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了现有群体行为特征集和相似性度量在应用于不同行为环境时的鲁棒性，并提出了一种基于自组织映射的方法来识别特征空间中无法区分的行为区域。
summary_zh: 集体行为通常需要通过数值特征来表达，例如用于分类或模仿学习。解决这个问题的方法通常是为特定的集群行为上下文提出一个特定的特征集，而很少进一步考虑该解决方案在设想场景之外的稳健性。然而，自动设计集群行为方法的发展取决于量化衡量集群行为相似性的能力。因此，我们研究了特征集对集体行为的影响。我们从之前的集群机器人研究工作中选取集群特征集和相似性度量，这些工作主要考虑了狭窄的行为上下文，并评估了它们的鲁棒性。我们证明了特征集和相似性度量的相互作用使某些组合更适合区分相似行为的群体。我们还提出了一种基于自组织映射的方法来识别特征空间中难以区分行为的区域。

title: Eva-Tracker: ESDF-update-free, Visibility-aware Planning with Target Reacquisition for Robust Aerial Tracking
summary: The Euclidean Signed Distance Field (ESDF) is widely used in visibility evaluation to prevent occlusions and collisions during tracking. However, frequent ESDF updates introduce considerable computational overhead. To address this issue, we propose Eva-Tracker, a visibility-aware trajectory planning framework for aerial tracking that eliminates ESDF updates and incorporates a recovery-capable path generation method for target reacquisition. First, we design a target trajectory prediction method and a visibility-aware initial path generation algorithm that maintain an appropriate observation distance, avoid occlusions, and enable rapid replanning to reacquire the target when it is lost. Then, we propose the Field of View ESDF (FoV-ESDF), a precomputed ESDF tailored to the tracker's field of view, enabling rapid visibility evaluation without requiring updates. Finally, we optimize the trajectory using differentiable FoV-ESDF-based objectives to ensure continuous visibility throughout the tracking process. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our approach delivers more robust tracking results with lower computational effort than existing state-of-the-art methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/Yue-0/Eva-Tracker.
tldr: Eva-Tracker is a visibility-aware trajectory planning framework for aerial tracking that avoids ESDF updates by using a precomputed FoV-ESDF, leading to more robust tracking with lower computational overhead.
tldr_zh: Eva-Tracker是一个具有可见性感知能力的空中跟踪轨迹规划框架，它通过使用预先计算的FoV-ESDF来避免 ESDF 更新，从而以更低的计算开销实现更强大的跟踪效果。
summary_zh: 欧几里得符号距离场 (ESDF) 广泛应用于可见性评估，以在跟踪过程中防止遮挡和碰撞。然而，频繁的 ESDF 更新会带来相当大的计算开销。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Eva-Tracker，一种用于空中跟踪的可见性感知轨迹规划框架，它消除了 ESDF 更新，并结合了一种具有恢复能力的目标重捕获路径生成方法。首先，我们设计了一种目标轨迹预测方法和一种可见性感知的初始路径生成算法，该算法保持适当的观察距离，避免遮挡，并能够快速重新规划以在目标丢失时重新捕获目标。然后，我们提出了视场 ESDF (FoV-ESDF)，一种针对跟踪器视场预先计算的 ESDF，无需更新即可实现快速可见性评估。最后，我们使用基于可微 FoV-ESDF 的目标函数优化轨迹，以确保在整个跟踪过程中保持连续的可见性。大量的仿真和真实世界实验表明，与现有的最先进方法相比，我们的方法能够以更低的计算成本提供更鲁棒的跟踪结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/Yue-0/Eva-Tracker 获取。

title: Bus-Conditioned Zero-Shot Trajectory Generation via Task Arithmetic
summary: Mobility trajectory data provide essential support for smart city applications. However, such data are often difficult to obtain. Meanwhile, most existing trajectory generation methods implicitly assume that at least a subset of real mobility data from target city is available, which limits their applicability in data-inaccessible scenarios. In this work, we propose a new problem setting, called bus-conditioned zero-shot trajectory generation, where no mobility trajectories from a target city are accessible. The generation process relies solely on source city mobility data and publicly available bus timetables from both cities. Under this setting, we propose MobTA, the first approach to introduce task arithmetic into trajectory generation. MobTA models the parameter shift from bus-timetable-based trajectory generation to mobility trajectory generation in source city, and applies this shift to target city through arithmetic operations on task vectors. This enables trajectory generation that reflects target-city mobility patterns without requiring any real mobility data from it. Furthermore, we theoretically analyze MobTA's stability across base and instruction-tuned LLMs. Extensive experiments show that MobTA significantly outperforms existing methods, and achieves performance close to models finetuned using target city mobility trajectories.
tldr: The paper introduces MobTA, a novel approach for zero-shot trajectory generation in cities with no accessible mobility data, leveraging task arithmetic on bus timetables and mobility data from source cities. It demonstrates performance close to models finetuned with target city data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MobTA，一种新颖的零样本轨迹生成方法，利用源城市的公交时刻表和移动数据，在没有可访问的移动数据的城市中生成轨迹。该方法性能接近使用目标城市数据微调的模型。
summary_zh: 移动轨迹数据为智慧城市应用提供重要的支持。然而，此类数据通常难以获取。同时，大多数现有的轨迹生成方法都隐式地假设可以获得目标城市至少一部分真实移动数据，这限制了它们在数据不可访问场景中的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的问题设定，称为基于公交的零样本轨迹生成，其中无法访问目标城市的任何移动轨迹。生成过程仅依赖于源城市的移动数据和两个城市的公开公交时刻表。在此设定下，我们提出了MobTA，这是第一个将任务算术引入轨迹生成的方法。MobTA对源城市中基于公交时刻表的轨迹生成到移动轨迹生成的参数偏移进行建模，并通过任务向量上的算术运算将该偏移应用于目标城市。这实现了反映目标城市移动模式的轨迹生成，而无需任何来自目标城市的真实移动数据。此外，我们从理论上分析了MobTA在基础和指令调优的大语言模型中的稳定性。大量的实验表明，MobTA显著优于现有方法，并且实现了接近使用目标城市移动轨迹微调的模型的性能。

title: Diverging Flows: Detecting Extrapolations in Conditional Generation
summary: The ability of Flow Matching (FM) to model complex conditional distributions has established it as the state-of-the-art for prediction tasks (e.g., robotics, weather forecasting). However, deployment in safety-critical settings is hindered by a critical extrapolation hazard: driven by smoothness biases, flow models yield plausible outputs even for off-manifold conditions, resulting in silent failures indistinguishable from valid predictions. In this work, we introduce Diverging Flows, a novel approach that enables a single model to simultaneously perform conditional generation and native extrapolation detection by structurally enforcing inefficient transport for off-manifold inputs. We evaluate our method on synthetic manifolds, cross-domain style transfer, and weather temperature forecasting, demonstrating that it achieves effective detection of extrapolations without compromising predictive fidelity or inference latency. These results establish Diverging Flows as a robust solution for trustworthy flow models, paving the way for reliable deployment in domains such as medicine, robotics, and climate science.
tldr: The paper introduces "Diverging Flows," a method to detect extrapolations in Flow Matching models, which are crucial for safety-critical applications, by enforcing inefficient transport for off-manifold inputs, and demonstrates its effectiveness on various tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为“发散流”(Diverging Flows)的方法，用于检测流匹配模型中的外推，这对于安全关键型应用至关重要，通过对非流形输入强制执行低效传输，并在各种任务中证明了其有效性。
summary_zh: 流匹配(FM)建模复杂条件分布的能力使其成为预测任务(例如，机器人、天气预报)的最新技术。然而，在安全关键环境中的部署受到一个关键的外推风险的阻碍：由于平滑性偏差，流模型即使在离群条件下也会产生貌似合理的输出，导致静默失效，难以与有效的预测区分开来。在这项工作中，我们引入了发散流，这是一种新颖的方法，使单个模型能够同时执行条件生成和原生外推检测，通过结构性地强制离群输入的低效传输。我们在合成流形、跨域风格转换和天气温度预测上评估了我们的方法，证明它可以在不损害预测保真度或推理延迟的情况下，有效检测外推。这些结果确立了发散流作为可信流模型的稳健解决方案，为在医学、机器人和气候科学等领域中的可靠部署铺平了道路。

title: Synaptic Activation and Dual Liquid Dynamics for Interpretable Bio-Inspired Models
summary: In this paper, we present a unified framework for various bio-inspired models to better understand their structural and functional differences. We show that liquid-capacitance-extended models lead to interpretable behavior even in dense, all-to-all recurrent neural network (RNN) policies. We further demonstrate that incorporating chemical synapses improves interpretability and that combining chemical synapses with synaptic activation yields the most accurate and interpretable RNN models. To assess the accuracy and interpretability of these RNN policies, we consider the challenging lane-keeping control task and evaluate performance across multiple metrics, including turn-weighted validation loss, neural activity during driving, absolute correlation between neural activity and road trajectory, saliency maps of the networks' attention, and the robustness of their saliency maps measured by the structural similarity index.
tldr: This paper presents a framework for interpretable bio-inspired RNN models for a lane-keeping control task, showing improved interpretability with chemical synapses and synaptic activation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个可解释的生物启发RNN模型框架，用于车道保持控制任务，并表明化学突触和突触激活可以提高可解释性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一个统一的框架，用于更好地理解各种生物启发模型的结构和功能差异。我们表明，液态电容扩展模型即使在密集的、全连接的递归神经网络（RNN）策略中也能产生可解释的行为。我们进一步证明，引入化学突触可以提高可解释性，并且将化学突触与突触激活相结合可以产生最准确和可解释的RNN模型。为了评估这些RNN策略的准确性和可解释性，我们考虑了具有挑战性的车道保持控制任务，并跨多个指标评估性能，包括转弯加权验证损失、驾驶期间的神经活动、神经活动与道路轨迹之间的绝对相关性、网络注意力的显著图，以及通过结构相似性指数衡量的显著图的鲁棒性。

title: Detecting Object Tracking Failure via Sequential Hypothesis Testing
summary: Real-time online object tracking in videos constitutes a core task in computer vision, with wide-ranging applications including video surveillance, motion capture, and robotics. Deployed tracking systems usually lack formal safety assurances to convey when tracking is reliable and when it may fail, at best relying on heuristic measures of model confidence to raise alerts. To obtain such assurances we propose interpreting object tracking as a sequential hypothesis test, wherein evidence for or against tracking failures is gradually accumulated over time. Leveraging recent advancements in the field, our sequential test (formalized as an e-process) quickly identifies when tracking failures set in whilst provably containing false alerts at a desired rate, and thus limiting potentially costly re-calibration or intervention steps. The approach is computationally light-weight, requires no extra training or fine-tuning, and is in principle model-agnostic. We propose both supervised and unsupervised variants by leveraging either ground-truth or solely internal tracking information, and demonstrate its effectiveness for two established tracking models across four video benchmarks. As such, sequential testing can offer a statistically grounded and efficient mechanism to incorporate safety assurances into real-time tracking systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a sequential hypothesis testing framework for detecting object tracking failures in real-time video, providing statistical guarantees and model-agnostic adaptability without requiring extra training.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于检测实时视频中目标跟踪失败的序贯假设检验框架，该框架提供了统计保证和与模型无关的适应性，且不需要额外的训练。
summary_zh: 实时在线视频目标跟踪是计算机视觉中的一项核心任务，其应用范围广泛，包括视频监控、动作捕捉和机器人技术。已部署的跟踪系统通常缺乏正式的安全保证来表明跟踪何时可靠以及何时可能失败，最多只能依靠模型置信度的启发式度量来发出警报。为了获得这种保证，我们提出将目标跟踪解释为一个序贯假设检验，其中支持或反对跟踪失败的证据随着时间的推移逐渐积累。利用该领域的最新进展，我们的序贯检验（形式化为e-过程）可以快速识别出跟踪失败开始的时间，同时以期望的比率可证明地控制误报，从而限制潜在的高成本重新校准或干预步骤。该方法计算量轻，不需要额外的训练或微调，并且原则上与模型无关。我们提出了监督和非监督两种变体，分别利用真实标签或仅利用内部跟踪信息，并在四个视频基准测试中证明了其对两种已建立的跟踪模型的有效性。因此，序贯检验可以为实时跟踪系统提供一种具有统计基础且高效的机制，以整合安全保证。

title: Never say never: Exploring the effects of available knowledge on agent persuasiveness in controlled physiotherapy motivation dialogues
summary: Generative Social Agents (GSAs) are increasingly impacting human users through persuasive means. On the one hand, they might motivate users to pursue personal goals, such as healthier lifestyles. On the other hand, they are associated with potential risks like manipulation and deception, which are induced by limited control over probabilistic agent outputs. However, as GSAs manifest communicative patterns based on available knowledge, their behavior may be regulated through their access to such knowledge. Following this approach, we explored persuasive ChatGPT-generated messages in the context of human-robot physiotherapy motivation. We did so by comparing ChatGPT-generated responses to predefined inputs from a hypothetical physiotherapy patient. In Study 1, we qualitatively analyzed 13 ChatGPT-generated dialogue scripts with varying knowledge configurations regarding persuasive message characteristics. In Study 2, third-party observers (N = 27) rated a selection of these dialogues in terms of the agent's expressiveness, assertiveness, and persuasiveness. Our findings indicate that LLM-based GSAs can adapt assertive and expressive personality traits -- significantly enhancing perceived persuasiveness. Moreover, persuasiveness significantly benefited from the availability of information about the patients' age and past profession, mediated by perceived assertiveness and expressiveness. Contextual knowledge about physiotherapy benefits did not significantly impact persuasiveness, possibly because the LLM had inherent knowledge about such benefits even without explicit prompting. Overall, the study highlights the importance of empirically studying behavioral patterns of GSAs, specifically in terms of what information generative AI systems require for consistent and responsible communication.
tldr: This paper explores how varying the knowledge available to a ChatGPT-based social agent affects its persuasiveness in physiotherapy motivation dialogues, finding that age and profession information significantly enhances persuasiveness via perceived assertiveness and expressiveness.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了在物理治疗激励对话中，改变基于 ChatGPT 的社交代理可用的知识如何影响其说服力，发现年龄和职业信息通过感知到的自信和表达能力显着增强说服力。
summary_zh: 生成式社交智能体（GSAs）正通过说服手段对人类用户产生越来越大的影响。一方面，它们可能激励用户追求个人目标，例如更健康的生活方式。另一方面，它们也与潜在的风险相关，例如操纵和欺骗，这些风险是由对概率性智能体输出的有限控制所引发的。然而，由于 GSAs 基于现有知识表现出交流模式，因此可以通过控制它们对这些知识的访问来调节其行为。遵循这一方法，我们探索了在人机物理治疗激励背景下由 ChatGPT 生成的说服性信息。我们通过比较 ChatGPT 对假设的物理治疗患者预定义输入的响应来实现这一点。在研究1中，我们定性分析了13个 ChatGPT 生成的对话脚本，这些脚本具有关于说服性信息特征的不同知识配置。在研究2中，第三方观察者（N = 27）根据智能体的表达力、自信性和说服力对这些对话中的一部分进行了评分。我们的研究结果表明，基于 LLM 的 GSAs 可以适应自信和富有表现力的人格特质——显著增强感知到的说服力。此外，说服力显著受益于关于患者年龄和以往职业的信息，并通过感知到的自信性和表达力发挥中介作用。关于物理治疗益处的背景知识并没有对说服力产生显著影响，这可能是因为即使没有明确的提示，LLM 也具有关于这些益处的内在知识。总而言之，该研究强调了对 GSAs 的行为模式进行实证研究的重要性，特别是在生成式人工智能系统需要哪些信息才能实现一致和负责任的沟通方面。

title: Robustness of Object Detection of Autonomous Vehicles in Adverse Weather Conditions
summary: As self-driving technology advances toward widespread adoption, determining safe operational thresholds across varying environmental conditions becomes critical for public safety. This paper proposes a method for evaluating the robustness of object detection ML models in autonomous vehicles under adverse weather conditions. It employs data augmentation operators to generate synthetic data that simulates different severance degrees of the adverse operation conditions at progressive intensity levels to find the lowest intensity of the adverse conditions at which the object detection model fails. The robustness of the object detection model is measured by the average first failure coefficients (AFFC) over the input images in the benchmark. The paper reports an experiment with four object detection models: YOLOv5s, YOLOv11s, Faster R-CNN, and Detectron2, utilising seven data augmentation operators that simulate weather conditions fog, rain, and snow, and lighting conditions of dark, bright, flaring, and shadow. The experiment data show that the method is feasible, effective, and efficient to evaluate and compare the robustness of object detection models in various adverse operation conditions. In particular, the Faster R-CNN model achieved the highest robustness with an overall average AFFC of 71.9% over all seven adverse conditions, while YOLO variants showed the AFFC values of 43%. The method is also applied to assess the impact of model training that targets adverse operation conditions using synthetic data on model robustness. It is observed that such training can improve robustness in adverse conditions but may suffer from diminishing returns and forgetting phenomena (i.e., decline in robustness) if overtrained.
tldr: This paper introduces a method to evaluate the robustness of object detection models in autonomous vehicles under adverse weather conditions using data augmentation and an Average First Failure Coefficient (AFFC) metric, showing Faster R-CNN to be the most robust model tested.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种评估自动驾驶车辆中目标检测模型在恶劣天气条件下鲁棒性的方法，该方法使用数据增强和平均首次失败系数（AFFC）指标，结果表明Faster R-CNN是测试中最鲁棒的模型。
summary_zh: 随着自动驾驶技术向广泛应用不断发展，确定在不同环境条件下的安全操作阈值对于公共安全至关重要。本文提出了一种评估自动驾驶车辆中目标检测机器学习模型在恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒性的方法。该方法利用数据增强算子生成合成数据，模拟不同严重程度的恶劣操作条件，并逐步提高强度等级，以找到目标检测模型失效的恶劣条件的最低强度。目标检测模型的鲁棒性由基准测试中输入图像的平均首次失效系数 (AFFC) 来衡量。本文报告了一项实验，使用了四种目标检测模型：YOLOv5s、YOLOv11s、Faster R-CNN 和 Detectron2，并利用了七种数据增强算子来模拟雾、雨和雪等天气条件，以及黑暗、明亮、眩光和阴影等光照条件。实验数据表明，该方法可行、有效且高效，可以评估和比较目标检测模型在各种恶劣操作条件下的鲁棒性。特别是，Faster R-CNN 模型取得了最高的鲁棒性，在所有七种恶劣条件下，整体平均 AFFC 为 71.9%，而 YOLO 变体的 AFFC 值为 43%。该方法还被用于评估针对恶劣操作条件使用合成数据进行模型训练对模型鲁棒性的影响。研究表明，这种训练可以提高模型在恶劣条件下的鲁棒性，但如果过度训练，可能会面临收益递减和遗忘现象（即鲁棒性下降）。

title: Wireless TokenCom: RL-Based Tokenizer Agreement for Multi-User Wireless Token Communications
summary: Token Communications (TokenCom) has recently emerged as an effective new paradigm, where tokens are the unified units of multimodal communications and computations, enabling efficient digital semantic- and goal-oriented communications in future wireless networks. To establish a shared semantic latent space, the transmitters/receivers in TokenCom need to agree on an identical tokenizer model and codebook. To this end, an initial Tokenizer Agreement (TA) process is carried out in each communication episode, where the transmitter/receiver cooperate to choose from a set of pre-trained tokenizer models/ codebooks available to them both for efficient TokenCom. In this correspondence, we investigate TA in a multi-user downlink wireless TokenCom scenario, where the base station equipped with multiple antennas transmits video token streams to multiple users. We formulate the corresponding mixed-integer non-convex problem, and propose a hybrid reinforcement learning (RL) framework that integrates a deep Q-network (DQN) for joint tokenizer agreement and sub-channel assignment, with a deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) for beamforming. Simulation results show that the proposed framework outperforms baseline methods in terms of semantic quality and resource efficiency, while reducing the freezing events in video transmission by 68% compared to the conventional H.265-based scheme.
tldr: This paper proposes a reinforcement learning framework for tokenizer agreement and resource allocation in a multi-user wireless TokenCom system, achieving improved semantic quality and resource efficiency in video transmission.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的框架，用于多用户无线TokenCom系统中的tokenizer协议和资源分配，从而提高了视频传输的语义质量和资源效率。
summary_zh: 令牌通信(TokenCom)最近作为一种有效的新范式涌现，其中令牌是多模态通信和计算的统一单元，从而能够在未来的无线网络中实现高效的数字语义与目标导向型通信。为了建立共享的语义潜在空间，TokenCom中的发送端/接收端需要就相同的分词器模型和码本达成一致。为此，在每个通信阶段都会执行一个初始的分词器协议(TA)过程，在该过程中，发送端/接收端合作从双方可用的预训练分词器模型/码本集合中进行选择，以实现高效的TokenCom。本文研究了多用户下行链路无线TokenCom场景中的TA，其中配备多天线的基站将视频令牌流传输给多个用户。我们构建了相应的混合整数非凸问题，并提出了一种混合强化学习(RL)框架，该框架集成了深度Q网络(DQN)用于联合分词器协议和子信道分配，以及深度确定性策略梯度(DDPG)用于波束成形。仿真结果表明，所提出的框架在语义质量和资源效率方面优于基线方法，同时与传统的基于H.265的方案相比，视频传输中的冻结事件减少了68%。

title: Gradient-Enhanced Partitioned Gaussian Processes for Real-Time Quadrotor Dynamics Modeling
summary: We present a quadrotor dynamics Gaussian Process (GP) with gradient information that achieves real-time inference via state-space partitioning and approximation, and that includes aerodynamic effects using data from mid-fidelity potential flow simulations. While traditional GP-based approaches provide reliable Bayesian predictions with uncertainty quantification, they are computationally expensive and thus unsuitable for real-time simulations. To address this challenge, we integrate gradient information to improve accuracy and introduce a novel partitioning and approximation strategy to reduce online computational cost. In particular, for the latter, we associate a local GP with each non-overlapping region; by splitting the training data into local near and far subsets, and by using Schur complements, we show that a large part of the matrix inversions required for inference can be performed offline, enabling real-time inference at frequencies above 30 Hz on standard desktop hardware. To generate a training dataset that captures aerodynamic effects, such as rotor-rotor interactions and apparent wind direction, we use the CHARM code, which is a mid-fidelity aerodynamic solver. It is applied to the SUI Endurance quadrotor to predict force and torque, along with noise at three specified locations. The derivative information is obtained via finite differences. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed partitioned GP with gradient conditioning achieves higher accuracy than standard partitioned GPs without gradient information, while greatly reducing computational time. This framework provides an efficient foundation for real-time aerodynamic prediction and control algorithms in complex and unsteady environments.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time Gaussian Process-based quadrotor dynamics modeling technique that incorporates gradient information and state-space partitioning to improve accuracy and reduce computational cost, enabling real-time performance with aerodynamic effects modeled using mid-fidelity simulations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于高斯过程的实时四旋翼动力学建模技术，该技术结合了梯度信息和状态空间划分，以提高精度并降低计算成本，从而能够实现实时性能，并使用中等保真度模拟来模拟空气动力学效应。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种带有梯度信息的四旋翼动力学高斯过程(GP)模型，通过状态空间划分和近似实现实时推断，并利用中等精度势流仿真数据纳入了空气动力学效应。传统基于GP的方法虽然能提供可靠的贝叶斯预测和不确定性量化，但是计算开销大，因此不适合实时仿真。为了解决这个挑战，我们结合了梯度信息来提高精度，并引入了一种新的划分和近似策略来降低在线计算成本。具体来说，对于后者，我们将每个非重叠区域关联到一个局部GP；通过将训练数据分成近场和远场子集，并使用舒尔补，我们证明了推断所需的大部分矩阵求逆操作可以离线进行，从而可以在标准桌面硬件上实现超过30 Hz频率的实时推断。为了生成能够捕捉空气动力学效应（如旋翼-旋翼相互作用和视在风向）的训练数据集，我们使用了CHARM代码，这是一种中等精度的空气动力学求解器。它被应用于SUI Endurance四旋翼，以预测力矩，以及三个指定位置的噪声。导数信息通过有限差分获得。实验结果表明，所提出的带有梯度条件的分区GP比没有梯度信息的标准分区GP实现了更高的精度，同时大大减少了计算时间。该框架为复杂和非定常环境下的实时空气动力学预测和控制算法提供了一个高效的基础。

title: An Autonomous, End-to-End, Convex-Based Framework for Close-Range Rendezvous Trajectory Design and Guidance with Hardware Testbed Validation
summary:
Autonomous satellite servicing missions must execute close-range rendezvous under stringent safety and operational constraints while remaining computationally tractable for onboard use and robust to uncertainty in sensing, actuation, and dynamics. This paper presents CORTEX (Convex Optimization for Rendezvous Trajectory Execution), an autonomous, perception-enabled, real-time trajectory design and guidance framework for close-range rendezvous. CORTEX integrates a deep-learning perception pipeline with convex-optimisation-based trajectory design and guidance, including reference regeneration and abort-to-safe-orbit logic to recover from large deviations caused by sensor faults and engine failures.
  CORTEX is validated in high-fidelity software simulation and hardware-in-the-loop experiments. The software pipeline (Basilisk) models high-fidelity relative dynamics, realistic thruster execution, perception, and attitude control. Hardware testing uses (i) an optical navigation testbed to assess perception-to-estimation performance and (ii) a planar air-bearing testbed to evaluate the end-to-end guidance loop under representative actuation and subsystem effects. A Monte-Carlo campaign in simulation includes initial-state uncertainty, thrust-magnitude errors, and missed-thrust events; under the strongest case investigated, CORTEX achieves terminal docking errors of $36.85 \pm 44.46$ mm in relative position and $1.25 \pm 2.26$ mm/s in relative velocity. On the planar air-bearing testbed, 18 cases are executed (10 nominal; 8 off-nominal requiring recomputation and/or abort due to simulated engine failure and sensor malfunctions), yielding terminal errors of $8.09 \pm 5.29$ mm in position and $2.23 \pm 1.72$ mm/s in velocity.
tldr: This paper presents CORTEX, a convex optimization framework for autonomous close-range satellite rendezvous, validated through simulations and hardware experiments with robust performance under uncertainties and failures.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了CORTEX，一个基于凸优化的自主近距离卫星交会框架，通过仿真和硬件实验验证，在不确定性和故障下具有鲁棒的性能。
summary_zh:
自主卫星服务任务必须在严格的安全和操作约束下执行近距离交会，同时保持计算可行性以便在机载使用，并对感知、驱动和动力学方面的不确定性具有鲁棒性。本文提出CORTEX（用于交会轨迹执行的凸优化），这是一个自主的、具有感知能力的、实时的近距离交会轨迹设计和引导框架。CORTEX集成了深度学习感知流水线，以及基于凸优化的轨迹设计和引导，包括参考轨迹再生和中止至安全轨道逻辑，以从传感器故障和发动机故障引起的大偏差中恢复。
  CORTEX在高保真软件仿真和硬件在环实验中得到了验证。该软件流水线（Basilisk）模拟了高保真相对动力学、真实的推进器执行、感知和姿态控制。硬件测试使用（i）光学导航测试平台来评估感知到估计的性能，以及（ii）平面气浮轴承测试平台来评估在代表性的驱动和子系统效应下的端到端引导回路。仿真中的蒙特卡洛活动包括初始状态不确定性、推力大小误差和推力缺失事件；在研究的最严峻情况下，CORTEX实现了相对位置$36.85 \pm 44.46$ mm和相对速度$1.25 \pm 2.26$ mm/s的终端对接误差。在平面气浮轴承测试平台上，执行了18个案例（10个标称案例；8个非标称案例，由于模拟的发动机故障和传感器故障需要重新计算和/或中止），产生的终端位置误差为$8.09 \pm 5.29$ mm，速度误差为$2.23 \pm 1.72$ mm/s。

title: X-VORTEX: Spatio-Temporal Contrastive Learning for Wake Vortex Trajectory Forecasting
summary: Wake vortices are strong, coherent air turbulences created by aircraft, and they pose a major safety and capacity challenge for air traffic management. Tracking how vortices move, weaken, and dissipate over time from LiDAR measurements is still difficult because scans are sparse, vortex signatures fade as the flow breaks down under atmospheric turbulence and instabilities, and point-wise annotation is prohibitively expensive. Existing approaches largely treat each scan as an independent, fully supervised segmentation problem, which overlooks temporal structure and does not scale to the vast unlabeled archives collected in practice. We present X-VORTEX, a spatio-temporal contrastive learning framework grounded in Augmentation Overlap Theory that learns physics-aware representations from unlabeled LiDAR point cloud sequences. X-VORTEX addresses two core challenges: sensor sparsity and time-varying vortex dynamics. It constructs paired inputs from the same underlying flight event by combining a weakly perturbed sequence with a strongly augmented counterpart produced via temporal subsampling and spatial masking, encouraging the model to align representations across missing frames and partial observations. Architecturally, a time-distributed geometric encoder extracts per-scan features and a sequential aggregator models the evolving vortex state across variable-length sequences. We evaluate on a real-world dataset of over one million LiDAR scans. X-VORTEX achieves superior vortex center localization while using only 1% of the labeled data required by supervised baselines, and the learned representations support accurate trajectory forecasting.
tldr: The paper introduces X-VORTEX, a spatio-temporal contrastive learning framework for wake vortex trajectory forecasting from LiDAR data, addressing the challenges of sensor sparsity and time-varying vortex dynamics using unlabeled data and achieving superior performance with minimal labeled data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了X-VORTEX，一个用于从激光雷达数据中预测尾流轨迹的时空对比学习框架。它解决了传感器稀疏性和时变涡流动态的挑战，使用无标签数据，并以最少的有标签数据实现了卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 尾流涡旋是飞机产生的强烈、相干的气流湍流，对空中交通管理提出了重要的安全和容量挑战。由于扫描稀疏、涡旋特征随着气流在大气湍流和不稳定条件下分解而逐渐消失，以及逐点标注的成本过高，因此利用激光雷达测量追踪涡旋如何随时间移动、减弱和消散仍然很困难。现有方法大多将每次扫描视为一个独立的、完全监督的分割问题，忽略了时间结构，并且无法扩展到实践中收集的大量未标记存档数据。我们提出了一种基于增广重叠理论的时空对比学习框架——X-VORTEX，它从未标记的激光雷达点云序列中学习具有物理感知能力的表征。X-VORTEX解决了两个核心挑战：传感器稀疏性和时变涡旋动态。它通过将一个弱扰动序列与一个通过时间子采样和空间掩蔽产生的强增强对应物组合，从同一底层飞行事件构建配对输入，鼓励模型在缺失帧和部分观测之间对齐表征。在架构上，一个时间分布的几何编码器提取每次扫描的特征，而一个序列聚合器对不同长度序列中演变的涡旋状态进行建模。我们在包含超过一百万次激光雷达扫描的真实世界数据集上进行了评估。X-VORTEX在仅使用监督基线所需标记数据的1%的情况下，实现了卓越的涡旋中心定位，并且学习到的表征支持准确的轨迹预测。

title: Energy-Aware Spike Budgeting for Continual Learning in Spiking Neural Networks for Neuromorphic Vision
summary: Neuromorphic vision systems based on spiking neural networks (SNNs) offer ultra-low-power perception for event-based and frame-based cameras, yet catastrophic forgetting remains a critical barrier to deployment in continually evolving environments. Existing continual learning methods, developed primarily for artificial neural networks, seldom jointly optimize accuracy and energy efficiency, with particularly limited exploration on event-based datasets. We propose an energy-aware spike budgeting framework for continual SNN learning that integrates experience replay, learnable leaky integrate-and-fire neuron parameters, and an adaptive spike scheduler to enforce dataset-specific energy constraints during training. Our approach exhibits modality-dependent behavior: on frame-based datasets (MNIST, CIFAR-10), spike budgeting acts as a sparsity-inducing regularizer, improving accuracy while reducing spike rates by up to 47\%; on event-based datasets (DVS-Gesture, N-MNIST, CIFAR-10-DVS), controlled budget relaxation enables accuracy gains up to 17.45 percentage points with minimal computational overhead. Across five benchmarks spanning both modalities, our method demonstrates consistent performance improvements while minimizing dynamic power consumption, advancing the practical viability of continual learning in neuromorphic vision systems.
tldr: This paper introduces an energy-aware spike budgeting framework for continual learning in spiking neural networks (SNNs), improving accuracy and reducing power consumption on both frame-based and event-based neuromorphic vision datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种能量感知脉冲预算框架，用于脉冲神经网络（SNN）中的持续学习，从而提高了在基于帧和基于事件的神经形态视觉数据集上的精度并降低了功耗。
summary_zh: 基于脉冲神经网络(SNNs)的神经形态视觉系统为基于事件和基于帧的相机提供了超低功耗感知能力，然而灾难性遗忘仍然是在不断演变的环境中部署的关键障碍。 现有的持续学习方法主要为人工神经网络开发，很少共同优化准确性和能量效率，并且在基于事件的数据集上的探索尤为有限。 我们提出了一种用于持续SNN学习的能量感知脉冲预算框架，该框架集成了经验回放、可学习的漏电积分和激发神经元参数以及自适应脉冲调度器，以在训练期间强制执行特定于数据集的能量约束。 我们的方法表现出模态依赖性行为：在基于帧的数据集（MNIST，CIFAR-10）上，脉冲预算充当稀疏性诱导正则化器，提高准确率同时降低脉冲速率高达47％； 在基于事件的数据集（DVS-Gesture，N-MNIST，CIFAR-10-DVS）上，受控的预算松弛可实现高达17.45个百分点的准确率提升，同时计算开销最小。 在跨越两种模态的五个基准测试中，我们的方法证明了在最小化动态功耗的同时，性能得到了一致的提升，从而推进了神经形态视觉系统中持续学习的实际可行性。

title: Bandit Learning in Matching Markets with Interviews
summary: Two-sided matching markets rely on preferences from both sides, yet it is often impractical to evaluate preferences. Participants, therefore, conduct a limited number of interviews, which provide early, noisy impressions and shape final decisions. We study bandit learning in matching markets with interviews, modeling interviews as \textit{low-cost hints} that reveal partial preference information to both sides. Our framework departs from existing work by allowing firm-side uncertainty: firms, like agents, may be unsure of their own preferences and can make early hiring mistakes by hiring less preferred agents. To handle this, we extend the firm's action space to allow \emph{strategic deferral} (choosing not to hire in a round), enabling recovery from suboptimal hires and supporting decentralized learning without coordination. We design novel algorithms for (i) a centralized setting with an omniscient interview allocator and (ii) decentralized settings with two types of firm-side feedback. Across all settings, our algorithms achieve time-independent regret, a substantial improvement over the $O(\log T)$ regret bounds known for learning stable matchings without interviews. Also, under mild structured markets, decentralized performance matches the centralized counterpart up to polynomial factors in the number of agents and firms.
tldr: The paper studies bandit learning in two-sided matching markets with interviews, where both agents and firms learn preferences through noisy interviews and firms can strategically defer hiring. The work provides regret bounds and algorithms for centralized and decentralized settings.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了具有面试的双边匹配市场中的bandit学习，代理人和公司都通过有噪音的面试来学习偏好，并且公司可以策略性地推迟招聘。该研究为集中式和分散式环境提供了遗憾界限和算法。
summary_zh: 双边匹配市场依赖于双方的偏好，然而评估偏好通常是不切实际的。因此，参与者会进行有限数量的面试，这些面试会提供早期、带有噪声的印象，并影响最终决策。我们研究了带有面试的匹配市场中的 bandit 学习，将面试建模为\textit{低成本提示}，向双方揭示部分偏好信息。我们的框架不同于现有工作，它允许企业方的不确定性：企业，就像代理人一样，可能不确定自己的偏好，并且可能通过雇佣偏好较低的代理人而犯下早期雇佣错误。为了处理这种情况，我们扩展了企业的行为空间，允许\emph{策略性延期}（选择不在某一轮雇佣），从而能够从次优雇佣中恢复，并支持无需协调的去中心化学习。我们设计了用于 (i) 具有全知面试分配者的集中式环境和 (ii) 具有两种类型企业方反馈的去中心化环境的新算法。在所有环境下，我们的算法都实现了与时间无关的遗憾值，与已知的不带面试的学习稳定匹配的 $O(\log T)$ 遗憾界限相比，这是一个显著的改进。此外，在温和的结构化市场下，去中心化的性能在代理人和企业数量的多项式因子范围内与集中式性能相匹配。

title: Implicit-Scale 3D Reconstruction for Multi-Food Volume Estimation from Monocular Images
summary: We present Implicit-Scale 3D Reconstruction from Monocular Multi-Food Images, a benchmark dataset designed to advance geometry-based food portion estimation in realistic dining scenarios. Existing dietary assessment methods largely rely on single-image analysis or appearance-based inference, including recent vision-language models, which lack explicit geometric reasoning and are sensitive to scale ambiguity. This benchmark reframes food portion estimation as an implicit-scale 3D reconstruction problem under monocular observations. To reflect real-world conditions, explicit physical references and metric annotations are removed; instead, contextual objects such as plates and utensils are provided, requiring algorithms to infer scale from implicit cues and prior knowledge. The dataset emphasizes multi-food scenes with diverse object geometries, frequent occlusions, and complex spatial arrangements. The benchmark was adopted as a challenge at the MetaFood 2025 Workshop, where multiple teams proposed reconstruction-based solutions. Experimental results show that while strong vision--language baselines achieve competitive performance, geometry-based reconstruction methods provide both improved accuracy and greater robustness, with the top-performing approach achieving 0.21 MAPE in volume estimation and 5.7 L1 Chamfer Distance in geometric accuracy.
tldr: The paper introduces a new benchmark dataset, Implicit-Scale 3D Reconstruction from Monocular Multi-Food Images, for improving geometry-based food portion estimation by requiring algorithms to infer scale from contextual cues in multi-food scenes, showing reconstruction-based methods outperform vision-language models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的基准数据集，即基于单目多食物图像的隐式尺度 3D 重建，旨在通过要求算法从多食物场景中的上下文线索推断尺度来改进基于几何形状的食物份量估计，研究表明基于重建的方法优于视觉-语言模型。
summary_zh: 我们提出了基于单目多食物图像的隐式尺度3D重建，一个旨在推进真实用餐场景中基于几何的食物份量估计的基准数据集。 现有的膳食评估方法主要依赖于单图像分析或基于外观的推断，包括最近的视觉-语言模型，这些方法缺乏明确的几何推理，并且对尺度模糊性敏感。 这个基准将食物份量估计重新定义为单目观察下的隐式尺度3D重建问题。 为了反映真实世界的状况，明确的物理参考和度量标注被移除；取而代之的是，提供了诸如盘子和餐具之类的上下文对象，要求算法从隐式线索和先验知识中推断尺度。 该数据集强调具有多样对象几何形状、频繁遮挡和复杂空间排列的多食物场景。 该基准已在 MetaFood 2025 Workshop 上被采纳为一项挑战，多个团队提出了基于重建的解决方案。 实验结果表明，尽管强大的视觉-语言基线实现了有竞争力的性能，但基于几何的重建方法提供了更高的准确性和更强的鲁棒性，其中表现最佳的方法在体积估计中实现了 0.21 的 MAPE，在几何精度上实现了 5.7 的 L1 Chamfer 距离。

title: MASAR: Motion-Appearance Synergy Refinement for Joint Detection and Trajectory Forecasting
summary: Classical autonomous driving systems connect perception and prediction modules via hand-crafted bounding-box interfaces, limiting information flow and propagating errors to downstream tasks. Recent research aims to develop end-to-end models that jointly address perception and prediction; however, they often fail to fully exploit the synergy between appearance and motion cues, relying mainly on short-term visual features. We follow the idea of "looking backward to look forward", and propose MASAR, a novel fully differentiable framework for joint 3D detection and trajectory forecasting compatible with any transformer-based 3D detector. MASAR employs an object-centric spatio-temporal mechanism that jointly encodes appearance and motion features. By predicting past trajectories and refining them using guidance from appearance cues, MASAR captures long-term temporal dependencies that enhance future trajectory forecasting. Experiments conducted on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate MASAR's effectiveness, showing improvements of over 20% in minADE and minFDE while maintaining robust detection performance. Code and models are available at https://github.com/aminmed/MASAR.
tldr: MASAR is a differentiable framework for joint 3D detection and trajectory forecasting that refines trajectories using appearance cues and past trajectory prediction, achieving significant performance improvements on the nuScenes dataset.
tldr_zh: MASAR是一个用于联合3D检测和轨迹预测的可微框架，它利用外观线索和过去的轨迹预测来优化轨迹，在nuScenes数据集上取得了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 经典自动驾驶系统通过手工设计的边界框接口连接感知和预测模块，限制了信息流动并将误差传播到下游任务。近期的研究致力于开发端到端模型，联合处理感知和预测；然而，它们通常无法充分利用外观和运动线索之间的协同作用，主要依赖于短期视觉特征。本文遵循“回顾过去，展望未来”的思路，提出MASAR，一种用于联合3D检测和轨迹预测的新型全可微框架，兼容任何基于Transformer的3D检测器。MASAR采用一种以物体为中心的时空机制，联合编码外观和运动特征。通过预测过去轨迹并利用外观线索的指导对其进行优化，MASAR捕获长期时间依赖性，从而增强未来轨迹预测。在nuScenes数据集上进行的实验验证了MASAR的有效性，在保持稳健检测性能的同时，minADE和minFDE指标改进超过20%。代码和模型可在https://github.com/aminmed/MASAR获取。

title: SPRig: Self-Supervised Pose-Invariant Rigging from Mesh Sequences
summary: State-of-the-art rigging methods assume a canonical rest pose--an assumption that fails for sequential data (e.g., animal motion capture or AIGC/video-derived mesh sequences) that lack the T-pose. Applied frame-by-frame, these methods are not pose-invariant and produce topological inconsistencies across frames. Thus We propose SPRig, a general fine-tuning framework that enforces cross-frame consistency losses to learn pose-invariant rigs on top of existing models. We validate our approach on rigging using a new permutation-invariant stability protocol. Experiments demonstrate SOTA temporal stability: our method produces coherent rigs from challenging sequences and dramatically reduces the artifacts that plague baseline methods. The code will be released publicly upon acceptance.
tldr: SPRig is a fine-tuning framework that learns pose-invariant rigs from mesh sequences by enforcing cross-frame consistency, improving temporal stability and reducing artifacts compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: SPRig 是一种微调框架，通过强制跨帧一致性，从网格序列中学习姿势不变的骨骼绑定，与现有方法相比，提高了时间稳定性和减少了伪影。
summary_zh: 最先进的骨骼绑定方法假设存在一个标准静态姿势——这一假设在缺乏T字姿势的序列数据（例如，动物动作捕捉或AIGC/视频导出的网格序列）中失效。逐帧应用时，这些方法不具备姿势不变性，并且会在帧之间产生拓扑不一致性。因此，我们提出了SPRig，一个通用的微调框架，它通过强制执行跨帧一致性损失，在现有模型之上学习姿势不变的骨骼绑定。我们使用一种新的置换不变稳定性协议来验证我们的方法在骨骼绑定方面的性能。实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的时间稳定性：我们的方法从具有挑战性的序列中生成连贯的骨骼绑定，并显著减少困扰基线方法的伪影。代码将在接受后公开发布。

title: Motion Prior Distillation in Time Reversal Sampling for Generative Inbetweening
summary: Recent progress in image-to-video (I2V) diffusion models has significantly advanced the field of generative inbetweening, which aims to generate semantically plausible frames between two keyframes. In particular, inference-time sampling strategies, which leverage the generative priors of large-scale pre-trained I2V models without additional training, have become increasingly popular. However, existing inference-time sampling, either fusing forward and backward paths in parallel or alternating them sequentially, often suffers from temporal discontinuities and undesirable visual artifacts due to the misalignment between the two generated paths. This is because each path follows the motion prior induced by its own conditioning frame. In this work, we propose Motion Prior Distillation (MPD), a simple yet effective inference-time distillation technique that suppresses bidirectional mismatch by distilling the motion residual of the forward path into the backward path. Our method can deliberately avoid denoising the end-conditioned path which causes the ambiguity of the path, and yield more temporally coherent inbetweening results with the forward motion prior. We not only perform quantitative evaluations on standard benchmarks, but also conduct extensive user studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in practical scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces Motion Prior Distillation (MPD), an inference-time technique that improves the temporal coherence of generated inbetweening frames in image-to-video diffusion models by distilling motion prior from the forward pass to the backward pass, thus reducing visual artifacts.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了运动先验蒸馏（MPD），一种推理时技术，通过将前向路径的运动先验提炼到后向路径，从而提高图像到视频扩散模型中生成的中间帧的时间连贯性，并减少视觉伪影。
summary_zh: 图像到视频（I2V）扩散模型近期的进展显著推动了生成中间帧领域的发展，该领域旨在生成两个关键帧之间语义上合理的帧。特别地，推理时采样策略，其利用大规模预训练I2V模型的生成先验且无需额外训练，变得越来越流行。然而，现有的推理时采样，无论是并行融合正向和反向路径，还是顺序交替它们，常常遭受时间不连续性和不希望出现的视觉伪影的困扰，这是由于两条生成路径之间的不对齐导致的。这是因为每个路径都遵循由其自身条件帧引起的运动先验。在本文中，我们提出运动先验蒸馏（MPD），一种简单却有效的推理时蒸馏技术，它通过将正向路径的运动残差蒸馏到反向路径来抑制双向不匹配。我们的方法可以特意避免去噪末端条件路径，这会引发路径的歧义，并能以正向运动先验产生更多时间一致的中间帧结果。我们不仅在标准基准上进行了定量评估，而且还进行了广泛的用户研究，以证明我们的方法在实际场景中的有效性。

title: Unbiased Gradient Estimation for Event Binning via Functional Backpropagation
summary: Event-based vision encodes dynamic scenes as asynchronous spatio-temporal spikes called events. To leverage conventional image processing pipelines, events are typically binned into frames. However, binning functions are discontinuous, which truncates gradients at the frame level and forces most event-based algorithms to rely solely on frame-based features. Attempts to directly learn from raw events avoid this restriction but instead suffer from biased gradient estimation due to the discontinuities of the binning operation, ultimately limiting their learning efficiency. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework for unbiased gradient estimation of arbitrary binning functions by synthesizing weak derivatives during backpropagation while keeping the forward output unchanged. The key idea is to exploit integration by parts: lifting the target functions to functionals yields an integral form of the derivative of the binning function during backpropagation, where the cotangent function naturally arises. By reconstructing this cotangent function from the sampled cotangent vector, we compute weak derivatives that provably match long-range finite differences of both smooth and non-smooth targets. Experimentally, our method improves simple optimization-based egomotion estimation with 3.2\% lower RMS error and 1.57$\times$ faster convergence. On complex downstream tasks, we achieve 9.4\% lower EPE in self-supervised optical flow, and 5.1\% lower RMS error in SLAM, demonstrating broad benefits for event-based visual perception. Source code can be found at https://github.com/chjz1024/EventFBP.
tldr: The paper proposes a novel method for unbiased gradient estimation in event-based vision, addressing limitations in existing binning approaches by using functional backpropagation to improve learning efficiency and performance in tasks like egomotion estimation, optical flow, and SLAM.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的事件视觉中无偏梯度估计方法，通过使用函数反向传播来解决现有binning方法的局限性，从而提高在诸如自运动估计，光流和SLAM等任务中的学习效率和性能。
summary_zh: 基于事件的视觉将动态场景编码为异步的时空脉冲，称为事件。为了利用传统的图像处理流程，事件通常被分箱成帧。然而，分箱函数是不连续的，这会在帧级别截断梯度，并迫使大多数基于事件的算法仅依赖于基于帧的特征。直接从原始事件中学习的尝试避免了这种限制，但由于分箱操作的不连续，会遭受有偏梯度估计的影响，最终限制了它们的学习效率。为了解决这个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，通过在反向传播期间合成弱导数，同时保持前向输出不变，来实现任意分箱函数的无偏梯度估计。关键思想是利用分部积分：将目标函数提升为泛函会产生反向传播期间分箱函数导数的积分形式，其中余切函数自然产生。通过从采样的余切向量重建这个余切函数，我们计算出弱导数，这些弱导数可以证明与平滑和非平滑目标的远距离有限差分相匹配。实验表明，我们的方法通过降低3.2%的RMS误差和提高1.57倍的收敛速度，改进了基于优化的简单自运动估计。在复杂的下游任务中，我们在自监督光流中实现了降低9.4%的EPE，在SLAM中实现了降低5.1%的RMS误差，表明了对基于事件的视觉感知的广泛益处。源代码可以在https://github.com/chjz1024/EventFBP 找到。

title: Barron-Wiener-Laguerre models
summary: We propose a probabilistic extension of Wiener-Laguerre models for causal operator learning. Classical Wiener-Laguerre models parameterize stable linear dynamics using orthonormal Laguerre bases and apply a static nonlinear map to the resulting features. While structurally efficient and interpretable, they provide only deterministic point estimates. We reinterpret the nonlinear component through the lens of Barron function approximation, viewing two-layer networks, random Fourier features, and extreme learning machines as discretizations of integral representations over parameter measures. This perspective naturally admits Bayesian inference on the nonlinear map and yields posterior predictive uncertainty. By combining Laguerre-parameterized causal dynamics with probabilistic Barron-type nonlinear approximators, we obtain a structured yet expressive class of causal operators equipped with uncertainty quantification. The resulting framework bridges classical system identification and modern measure-based function approximation, providing a principled approach to time-series modeling and nonlinear systems identification.
tldr: This paper introduces a probabilistic extension of Wiener-Laguerre models by incorporating Barron function approximation for causal operator learning, enabling uncertainty quantification in time-series modeling and nonlinear system identification.
tldr_zh: 本文通过结合Barron函数逼近，提出了一种Wiener-Laguerre模型的概率扩展方法，用于因果算子学习，从而能够在时间序列建模和非线性系统辨识中实现不确定性量化。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种Wiener-Laguerre模型的概率扩展，用于因果算子学习。经典的Wiener-Laguerre模型使用正交Laguerre基参数化稳定的线性动力学，并将静态非线性映射应用于生成的特征。虽然结构高效且可解释，但它们仅提供确定性的点估计。我们通过Barron函数逼近的视角重新解释非线性成分，将两层网络，随机傅里叶特征和极限学习机视为参数测度上积分表示的离散化。这种视角自然允许对非线性映射进行贝叶斯推断，并产生后验预测不确定性。通过将Laguerre参数化的因果动力学与概率的Barron型非线性逼近器相结合，我们获得了一个结构化且富有表现力的因果算子类，该算子配备了不确定性量化。由此产生的框架连接了经典的系统辨识和现代基于测度的函数逼近，为时间序列建模和非线性系统辨识提供了一种有原则的方法。

title: Media Framing Moderates Risk-Benefit Perceptions and Value Tradeoffs in Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Public acceptance of industrial human-robot collaboration (HRC) is shaped by how risks and benefits are perceived by affected employees. Positive or negative media framing may shape and shift how individuals evaluate HRC. This study examines how message framing moderates the effects of perceived risks and perceived benefits on overall attributed value. In a pre-registered study, participants (N = 1150) were randomly assigned to read either a positively or negatively framed newspaper article in one of three industrial contexts (autonomy, employment, safety) about HRC in production. Subsequently, perceived risks, benefits, and value were measured using reliable and publicly available psychometric scales. Two multiple regressions (one per framing condition) tested for main and interaction effects. Framing influenced absolute evaluations of risk, benefits, and value. In both frames, risks and benefits significantly predicted attributed value. Under positive framing, only main effects were observed (risks: beta = -0.52; benefits: beta = 0.45). Under negative framing, both predictors had stronger main effects (risks: beta = -0.69; benefits: beta = 0.63) along with a significant negative interaction (beta = -0.32), indicating that higher perceived risk diminishes the positive effect of perceived benefits. Model fit was higher for the positive frame (R^2 = 0.715) than for the negative frame (R^2 = 0.583), indicating greater explained variance in value attributions. Framing shapes the absolute evaluation of HRC and how risks and benefits are cognitively integrated in trade-offs. Negative framing produces stronger but interdependent effects, whereas positive framing supports additive evaluations. These findings highlight the role of strategic communication in fostering acceptance of HRC and underscore the need to consider framing in future HRC research.
tldr: This study investigates how positive or negative media framing influences people's perception of risks and benefits associated with human-robot collaboration (HRC) and how these perceptions affect overall value attribution. Negative framing leads to a stronger interdependent effect of risks and benefits while positive framing supports additive evaluations.
tldr_zh: 本研究调查了积极或消极的媒体框架如何影响人们对人机协作（HRC）相关风险和收益的看法，以及这些看法如何影响整体价值归因。消极框架导致风险和收益之间更强的相互依赖效应，而积极框架则支持加性评估。
summary_zh: 工业人机协作（HRC）的公众接受度受到受影响员工如何认知风险和收益的影响。正面或负面的媒体框架可能会塑造和改变个人对HRC的评估。本研究探讨了信息框架如何调节感知风险和感知收益对总体归因价值的影响。在一项预先注册的研究中，参与者（N = 1150）被随机分配阅读一篇正面或负面框架的新闻文章，文章内容涉及三种工业背景（自主性、就业、安全）下生产中的HRC。随后，使用可靠且公开可用的心理测量量表测量了感知风险、收益和价值。两个多元回归模型（每个框架条件下一个）检验了主效应和交互效应。框架影响了对风险、收益和价值的绝对评估。在两种框架下，风险和收益均能显著预测归因价值。在正面框架下，仅观察到主效应（风险：beta = -0.52；收益：beta = 0.45）。在负面框架下，两个预测变量的主效应都更强（风险：beta = -0.69；收益：beta = 0.63），并且存在显著的负向交互效应（beta = -0.32），表明更高的感知风险会降低感知收益的积极影响。正面框架的模型拟合度更高（R^2 = 0.715），而负面框架的模型拟合度较低（R^2 = 0.583），表明价值归因中解释的方差更大。框架塑造了对HRC的绝对评估，以及风险和收益如何在权衡中进行认知整合。负面框架产生更强但相互依赖的影响，而正面框架支持加性评估。这些发现突出了战略沟通在促进HRC接受度方面的作用，并强调了在未来的HRC研究中考虑框架的必要性。

title: Constrained PSO Six-Parameter Fuzzy PID Tuning Method for Balanced Optimization of Depth Tracking Performance in Underwater Vehicles
summary: Depth control of underwater vehicles in engineering applications must simultaneously satisfy requirements for rapid tracking, low overshoot, and actuator constraints. Traditional fuzzy PID tuning often relies on empirical methods, making it difficult to achieve a stable and reproducible equilibrium solution between performance enhancement and control cost. This paper proposes a constrained particle swarm optimization (PSO) method for tuning six-parameter fuzzy PID controllers. By adjusting the benchmark PID parameters alongside the fuzzy controller's input quantization factor and output proportional gain, it achieves synergistic optimization of the overall tuning strength and dynamic response characteristics of the fuzzy PID system. To ensure engineering feasibility of the optimization results, a time-weighted absolute error integral, adjustment time, relative overshoot control energy, and saturation occupancy rate are introduced. Control energy constraints are applied to construct a constraint-driven comprehensive evaluation system, suppressing pseudo-improvements achieved solely by increasing control inputs. Simulation results demonstrate that, while maintaining consistent control energy and saturation levels, the proposed method significantly enhances deep tracking performance: the time-weighted absolute error integral decreases from 0.2631 to 0.1473, the settling time shortens from 2.301 s to 1.613 s, and the relative overshoot reduces from 0.1494 to 0.01839. Control energy varied from 7980 to 7935, satisfying the energy constraint, while saturation occupancy decreased from 0.004 to 0.003. These results validate the effectiveness and engineering significance of the proposed constrained six-parameter joint tuning strategy for depth control in underwater vehicle navigation scenarios.
tldr: This paper presents a constrained PSO method for tuning six-parameter fuzzy PID controllers to optimize depth control in underwater vehicles, balancing performance and control cost by incorporating constraints on control energy and saturation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种约束粒子群优化（PSO）方法，用于调整六参数模糊PID控制器，以优化水下航行器的深度控制，通过纳入对控制能量和饱和度的约束，平衡性能和控制成本。
summary_zh: 水下航行器在工程应用中的深度控制必须同时满足快速跟踪、低超调和执行器约束的要求。传统的模糊PID整定通常依赖于经验方法，难以在性能提升和控制成本之间实现稳定且可复现的平衡解。本文提出了一种约束粒子群优化（PSO）方法，用于整 定六参数模糊PID控制器。通过调整基准PID参数以及模糊控制器的输入量化因子和输出比例增益，实现了对模糊PID系统整体整定强度和动态响应特性的协同优化。为了确保优化结果的工程可行性，引入了时间加权绝对误差积分、调节时间、相对超调控制能量和饱和度占用率。通过应用控制能量约束，构建了一个约束驱动的综合评价体系，抑制了仅通过增加控制输入获得的虚假改进。仿真结果表明，在保持一致的控制能量和饱和度水平下，所提出的方法显著提高了深度跟踪性能：时间加权绝对误差积分从0.2631降低至0.1473，稳定时间从2.301 s缩短至1.613 s，相对超调从0.1494降低至0.01839。控制能量从7980变为7935，满足能量约束，而饱和度占用率从0.004降低至0.003。这些结果验证了所提出的约束六参数联合整定策略在水下航行器导航场景中深度控制的有效性和工程意义。

title: Ultrasound-Guided Real-Time Spinal Motion Visualization for Spinal Instability Assessment
summary:
Purpose: Spinal instability is a widespread condition that causes pain, fatigue, and restricted mobility, profoundly affecting patients' quality of life. In clinical practice, the gold standard for diagnosis is dynamic X-ray imaging. However, X-ray provides only 2D motion information, while 3D modalities such as computed tomography (CT) or cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) cannot efficiently capture motion. Therefore, there is a need for a system capable of visualizing real-time 3D spinal motion while minimizing radiation exposure.
  Methods: We propose ultrasound as an auxiliary modality for 3D spine visualization. Due to acoustic limitations, ultrasound captures only the superficial spinal surface. Therefore, the partially compounded ultrasound volume is registered to preoperative 3D imaging. In this study, CBCT provides the neutral spine configuration, while robotic ultrasound acquisition is performed at maximal spinal bending. A kinematic model is applied to the CBCT-derived spine model for coarse registration, followed by ICP for fine registration, with kinematic parameters optimized based on the registration results. Real-time ultrasound motion tracking is then used to estimate continuous 3D spinal motion by interpolating between the neutral and maximally bent states.
  Results: The pipeline was evaluated on a bendable 3D-printed lumbar spine phantom. The registration error was $1.941 \pm 0.199$ mm and the interpolated spinal motion error was $2.01 \pm 0.309$ mm (median).
  Conclusion: The proposed robotic ultrasound framework enables radiation-reduced, real-time 3D visualization of spinal motion, offering a promising 3D alternative to conventional dynamic X-ray imaging for assessing spinal instability.
tldr: This paper proposes a robotic ultrasound framework for real-time 3D visualization of spinal motion to assess spinal instability, offering a radiation-reduced alternative to dynamic X-ray imaging. The method involves registering ultrasound data to a CBCT scan and interpolating motion.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种机器人超声框架，用于实时3D可视化脊柱运动，以评估脊柱不稳定性，为动态X射线成像提供了一种辐射减少的替代方案。该方法包括将超声数据配准到CBCT扫描，然后进行运动插值。
summary_zh:
目的：脊柱不稳是一种常见疾病，会导致疼痛、疲劳和活动受限，严重影响患者的生活质量。在临床实践中，动态X光成像被认为是诊断的金标准。然而，X光仅提供2D运动信息，而诸如计算机断层扫描(CT)或锥形束计算机断层扫描(CBCT)等3D模式无法有效捕捉运动。因此，需要一种能够可视化实时3D脊柱运动，同时最大限度地减少辐射暴露的系统。

方法：我们提出使用超声作为辅助模式来进行3D脊柱可视化。由于声学限制，超声仅能采集到表面的脊柱表面。因此，将部分复合成像的超声体积配准到术前3D成像。在本研究中，CBCT提供中立位的脊柱配置，而机器人超声采集在脊柱最大弯曲时进行。对CBCT得到的脊柱模型应用运动学模型进行粗配准，然后使用ICP进行精配准，并根据配准结果优化运动学参数。然后使用实时超声运动跟踪，通过在中立位和最大弯曲状态之间进行插值，来估计连续的3D脊柱运动。

结果：该流程在一个可弯曲的3D打印腰椎体模上进行了评估。配准误差为$1.941 \pm 0.199$ mm，插值脊柱运动误差为$2.01 \pm 0.309$ mm（中位数）。

结论：所提出的机器人超声框架能够实现辐射减小的脊柱运动实时3D可视化，为评估脊柱不稳提供了一种有前景的3D替代方案，以取代传统的动态X光成像。

title: Resource-Efficient Gesture Recognition through Convexified Attention
summary: Wearable e-textile interfaces require gesture recognition capabilities but face severe constraints in power consumption, computational capacity, and form factor that make traditional deep learning impractical. While lightweight architectures like MobileNet improve efficiency, they still demand thousands of parameters, limiting deployment on textile-integrated platforms. We introduce a convexified attention mechanism for wearable applications that dynamically weights features while preserving convexity through nonexpansive simplex projection and convex loss functions. Unlike conventional attention mechanisms using non-convex softmax operations, our approach employs Euclidean projection onto the probability simplex combined with multi-class hinge loss, ensuring global convergence guarantees. Implemented on a textile-based capacitive sensor with four connection points, our approach achieves 100.00\% accuracy on tap gestures and 100.00\% on swipe gestures -- consistent across 10-fold cross-validation and held-out test evaluation -- while requiring only 120--360 parameters, a 97\% reduction compared to conventional approaches. With sub-millisecond inference times (290--296$μ$s) and minimal storage requirements ($<$7KB), our method enables gesture interfaces directly within e-textiles without external processing. Our evaluation, conducted in controlled laboratory conditions with a single-user dataset, demonstrates feasibility for basic gesture interactions. Real-world deployment would require validation across multiple users, environmental conditions, and more complex gesture vocabularies. These results demonstrate how convex optimization can enable efficient on-device machine learning for textile interfaces.
tldr: This paper introduces a resource-efficient gesture recognition method using a convexified attention mechanism, achieving high accuracy with significantly fewer parameters compared to traditional deep learning approaches, enabling on-device processing for wearable e-textiles.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种资源高效的手势识别方法，使用凸化注意力机制，与传统的深度学习方法相比，该方法以更少的参数实现了高精度，从而可以在可穿戴电子纺织品上进行设备端处理。
summary_zh: 可穿戴电子纺织品界面需要手势识别能力，但面临功耗、计算能力和外形尺寸的严格限制，使得传统的深度学习方法难以实现。虽然像 MobileNet 这样的轻量级架构提高了效率，但它们仍然需要数千个参数，限制了在纺织品集成平台上的部署。我们为可穿戴应用引入了一种凸化的注意力机制，该机制动态地对特征进行加权，同时通过非扩张单形投影和凸损失函数来保持凸性。与使用非凸 softmax 运算的传统注意力机制不同，我们的方法采用欧几里德投影到概率单形上，并结合多类铰链损失，从而确保全局收敛性保证。在具有四个连接点的纺织品基电容式传感器上实现后，我们的方法在点击手势上实现了 100.00% 的准确率，在滑动操作手势上实现了 100.00% 的准确率——在 10 折交叉验证和留出测试评估中保持一致——同时仅需要 120-360 个参数，与传统方法相比减少了 97%。凭借亚毫秒级的推理时间 (290-296$μ$s) 和最小的存储需求 (<7KB)，我们的方法可以直接在电子纺织品内部实现手势界面，而无需外部处理。我们的评估是在受控实验室条件下使用单用户数据集进行的，验证了基本手势交互的可行性。实际部署将需要在多个用户、环境条件和更复杂的手势词汇表上进行验证。这些结果表明凸优化如何能够为纺织品界面实现高效的设备端机器学习。

title: Adaptive Scaling with Geometric and Visual Continuity of completed 3D objects
summary: Object completion networks typically produce static Signed Distance Fields (SDFs) that faithfully reconstruct geometry but cannot be rescaled or deformed without introducing structural distortions. This limitation restricts their use in applications requiring flexible object manipulation, such as indoor redesign, simulation, and digital content creation. We introduce a part-aware scaling framework that transforms these static completed SDFs into editable, structurally coherent objects. Starting from SDFs and Texture Fields generated by state-of-the-art completion models, our method performs automatic part segmentation, defines user-controlled scaling zones, and applies smooth interpolation of SDFs, color, and part indices to enable proportional and artifact-free deformation. We further incorporate a repetition-based strategy to handle large-scale deformations while preserving repeating geometric patterns. Experiments on Matterport3D and ShapeNet objects show that our method overcomes the inherent rigidity of completed SDFs and is visually more appealing than global and naive selective scaling, particularly for complex shapes and repetitive structures.
tldr: This paper introduces a part-aware scaling framework to transform static 3D object completions (SDFs) into editable and structurally coherent objects, enabling artifact-free deformation and maintaining repeating geometric patterns, particularly beneficial for complex shapes.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个部分感知的缩放框架，将静态的3D物体补全（SDF）转化为可编辑且结构连贯的物体，实现无伪影变形并保持重复的几何图案，尤其适用于复杂形状。
summary_zh: 目标补全网络通常生成静态有向距离场 (SDF)，其忠实地重建几何形状，但若不引入结构扭曲，则无法进行缩放或变形。这一局限性限制了它们在需要灵活对象操作的应用中的使用，例如室内重新设计、仿真和数字内容创作。我们引入了一种部件感知缩放框架，该框架将这些静态补全的 SDF 转换为可编辑、结构连贯的对象。从最先进的补全模型生成的 SDF 和纹理场开始，我们的方法执行自动部件分割，定义用户可控的缩放区域，并应用 SDF、颜色和部件索引的平滑插值，以实现比例化且无伪影的变形。我们进一步整合了一种基于重复的策略来处理大规模变形，同时保留重复的几何图案。在 Matterport3D 和 ShapeNet 对象上的实验表明，我们的方法克服了补全 SDF 固有的刚性，并且在视觉上比全局和简单的选择性缩放更具吸引力，特别是对于复杂的形状和重复结构。

title: Towards reconstructing experimental sparse-view X-ray CT data with diffusion models
summary: Diffusion-based image generators are promising priors for ill-posed inverse problems like sparse-view X-ray Computed Tomography (CT). As most studies consider synthetic data, it is not clear whether training data mismatch (``domain shift'') or forward model mismatch complicate their successful application to experimental data. We measured CT data from a physical phantom resembling the synthetic Shepp-Logan phantom and trained diffusion priors on synthetic image data sets with different degrees of domain shift towards it. Then, we employed the priors in a Decomposed Diffusion Sampling scheme on sparse-view CT data sets with increasing difficulty leading to the experimental data. Our results reveal that domain shift plays a nuanced role: while severe mismatch causes model collapse and hallucinations, diverse priors outperform well-matched but narrow priors. Forward model mismatch pulls the image samples away from the prior manifold, which causes artifacts but can be mitigated with annealed likelihood schedules that also increase computational efficiency. Overall, we demonstrate that performance gains do not immediately translate from synthetic to experimental data, and future development must validate against real-world benchmarks.
tldr: This paper investigates the application of diffusion models to reconstruct sparse-view X-ray CT data using both synthetic and experimental data, finding that domain shift and forward model mismatch significantly impact performance, and diverse training priors are more effective.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了使用扩散模型重建稀疏视角 X 射线 CT 数据的方法，使用了合成数据和实验数据。研究发现领域偏移和前向模型失配显著影响性能，并且多样化的训练先验更有效。
summary_zh: 基于扩散的图像生成器是解决病态逆问题（如稀疏视角X射线计算机断层扫描(CT)）的有前景的先验。由于大多数研究考虑合成数据，训练数据不匹配（“域偏移”）或前向模型不匹配是否阻碍了它们在实验数据上的成功应用尚不清楚。我们测量了来自物理体模的CT数据，该体模类似于合成的Shepp-Logan体模，并使用具有不同程度域偏移的合成图像数据集训练扩散先验。然后，我们在一个分解的扩散采样方案中，对具有增加难度的稀疏视角CT数据集（直至实验数据）应用了这些先验。我们的结果表明，域偏移扮演着微妙的角色：严重的失配会导致模型崩溃和幻觉，而多样化的先验优于匹配良好但范围狭窄的先验。前向模型失配会将图像样本拉离先验流形，从而导致伪影，但可以通过退火似然调度来缓解，这也会提高计算效率。总的来说，我们证明了性能增益并不能立即从合成数据转化为实验数据，未来的发展必须针对真实世界的基准进行验证。

title: Vehicle behaviour estimation for abnormal event detection using distributed fiber optic sensing
summary: The distributed fiber-optic sensing (DFOS) system is a cost-effective wide-area traffic monitoring technology that utilizes existing fiber infrastructure to effectively detect traffic congestions. However, detecting single-lane abnormalities, that lead to congestions, is still a challenge. These single-lane abnormalities can be detected by monitoring lane change behaviour of vehicles, performed to avoid congestion along the monitoring section of a road. This paper presents a method to detect single-lane abnormalities by tracking individual vehicle paths and detecting vehicle lane changes along a section of a road. We propose a method to estimate the vehicle position at all time instances and fit a path using clustering techniques. We detect vehicle lane change by monitoring any change in spectral centroid of vehicle vibrations by tracking a reference vehicle along a highway. The evaluation of our proposed method with real traffic data showed 80% accuracy for lane change detection events that represent presence of abnormalities.
tldr: This paper presents a method to detect single-lane traffic abnormalities by tracking vehicle lane changes using distributed fiber optic sensing and clustering techniques, achieving 80% accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种利用分布式光纤传感和聚类技术，通过跟踪车辆变道来检测单车道交通异常的方法，达到了80%的准确率。
summary_zh: 分布式光纤传感系统 (DFOS) 是一种经济高效的广域交通监控技术，它利用现有的光纤基础设施来有效检测交通拥堵。然而，检测导致拥堵的单车道异常仍然是一个挑战。这些单车道异常可以通过监控车辆的变道行为来检测，这些变道行为是为了避免沿道路监控路段的拥堵而进行的。本文提出了一种通过跟踪单个车辆路径并检测车辆沿一段道路的变道行为来检测单车道异常的方法。我们提出了一种在所有时间点估计车辆位置并使用聚类技术拟合路径的方法。我们通过跟踪高速公路上的参考车辆，监控车辆振动谱质心的任何变化来检测车辆变道。我们提出的方法通过真实交通数据的评估显示，对于代表异常存在的变道检测事件，准确率达到 80%。

title: Geometric Stratification for Singular Configurations of the P3P Problem via Local Dual Space
summary: This paper investigates singular configurations of the P3P problem. Using local dual space, a systematic algebraic-computational framework is proposed to give a complete geometric stratification for the P3P singular configurations with respect to the multiplicity $μ$ of the camera center $O$: for $μ\ge 2$, $O$ lies on the ``danger cylinder'', for $μ\ge 3$, $O$ lies on one of three generatrices of the danger cylinder associated with the first Morley triangle or the circumcircle, and for $μ\ge 4$, $O$ lies on the circumcircle which indeed corresponds to infinite P3P solutions. Furthermore, a geometric stratification for the complementary configuration $O^\prime$ associated with a singular configuration $O$ is studied as well: for $μ\ge 2$, $O^\prime$ lies on a deltoidal surface associated with the danger cylinder, and for $μ\ge 3$, $O^\prime$ lies on one of three cuspidal curves of the deltoidal surface.
tldr: The paper presents a complete geometric stratification for singular configurations of the Perspective-3-Point (P3P) problem using local dual space and algebraic-computational methods, focusing on multiplicity of the camera center.
tldr_zh: 该论文使用局部对偶空间和代数计算方法，对透视三点（P3P）问题的奇异配置进行了完整的几何分层，重点关注相机中心的多重性。
summary_zh: 本文研究P3P问题的奇异构型。利用局部对偶空间，提出了一个系统的代数计算框架，从而针对相机中心$O$的重数$μ$，给出了P3P奇异构型的完整几何分层：当$μ\ge 2$时，$O$位于“危险圆柱面”上；当$μ\ge 3$时，$O$位于危险圆柱面的三条母线之一上，这三条母线与第一莫雷三角形或外接圆相关联；当$μ\ge 4$时，$O$位于外接圆上，这确实对应于无穷多个P3P解的结果。此外，本文还研究了与奇异构型$O$相关联的互补构型$O^\prime$的几何分层：当$μ\ge 2$时，$O^\prime$位于一个与危险圆柱面相关的三角曲面上；当$μ\ge 3$时，$O^\prime$位于该三角曲面的三条尖点曲线之一上。
